calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Wong in Propria Persona. Judy Wong in Propria Persona. Nancy Tao Wong and Lisa Tao also present.

The Court reviewed a photo and original of the marriage license and certificate, and granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage (order for the same signed).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Continued To May-21-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Wong in Propria Persona. Nancy Tao Wong and Lisa Tao also present.

Mr. Wong stated that his Wife has the original marriage license and certificate in Louisiana and is on her way to San Francisco. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was continued to May 21, 2014 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Wong is directed to present the original certificate of marriage and marriage license to the Probate Examiner in Room 202.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
